function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - miles
  - claudia
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest invoice linked to the client at the tax firm.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email draft was written; need verify final content and then perform inbox cleanup.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read the written outbox email for verification
next_step.observation: Wrote 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md successfully and received outbox-writing verification checklist.

next_step.current_state: Verified outbox file content is correct; next complete inbox-processing cleanup by deleting handled inbox item.
next_step.observation: Read the created outbox email and confirmed recipient, subject quoting, and single attachment path match previously read records.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: oldest inbox message processed, outbound reply draft created with correct linked invoice, inbox item removed.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the requested action.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by preparing a reply email draft with the requested invoice attachment and then deleting the inbox item. Created: 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md with recipient miles@novak.example and attachment 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in each entered folder, used inbox email header as canonical sender metadata, resolved sender against canonical primary_contact_email, used sending-email workflow for outbox record format, and removed inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked for the oldest 1 invoice linked to the tax-firm client. Canonical sender verification matched miles@novak.example in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Tax-firm client resolved via 10_entities/cast/claudia.md (claudia@helios-tax.example). The selected attachment 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md explicitly lists related_entity Claudia Reiter and is the oldest Helios-linked invoice found. Outbound draft was created in the required outbox lane and inbox item was deleted afterward per inbox workflow.
